title: Abandoned Puppies Reunited with Mother; Suspect Charged
summary: Eight puppies abandoned in Gaston County were reunited with their mother. Charges are pending against a suspect.
charlotte_impact: Highlights animal welfare concerns and the importance of responsible pet ownership in the community.

title: Fatal Shooting in Kannapolis Leads to Manslaughter Charge
summary: A man faces a voluntary manslaughter charge after a fatal shooting on Sears Street in Kannapolis.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the ongoing issue of gun violence and its impact on the local community.

title: Warm Weekend Ahead, Dry Spell Increases Fire Risk
summary: A persistent dry spell grips the Carolinas, increasing fire risk with no rain in sight for the weekend.
charlotte_impact: Informs residents about potential environmental hazards and encourages preventative measures.

title: Woman Sentenced in Deadly DWI Crash on I-77
summary: Maria Leonard was sentenced to prison for a deadly crash on I-77 in May 2025 that resulted in one fatality.

title: Man Dies in Caldwell County House Fire
summary: A Caldwell County man was found dead in his basement after a house fire on Thursday morning.

title: Missing Gastonia Teen Found Safe After 5 Months
